The post UK, France, Germany and Poland warn against travel to Israel amid Iran tensions appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Inking over scars: Victims of Israel terror attacks get tattooed in New York
description:
'More beautiful than it was': Advocacy group Healing Ink tattoos survivors, family members as part of a therapeutic process
The post Inking over scars: Victims of Israel terror attacks get tattooed in New York appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Additional F-15s, F-22s and F-35s are Arriving to Reinforce U.S. Buildup in Middle East
description: Additional fighter and CSAR assets are being deployed to multiple bases across the Middle East as preparations for a potential attack on Iran appear to intensify. The last two days saw another influx of U.S. assets in Europe on their way to the Middle East, where they will join the buildup. In fact, between Feb. []

title: Trump says 'not happy' with Iran talks, but undecided on possible military action
description: US President Donald Trump said on Friday he was "not happy" with the way Iran was negotiating in talks with the US, but had not yet made a "final decision" on whether the US would launch military action against Tehran. His comments came as the US advised its non-emergency embassy staff to leave Israel "due to safety risks".

title: Israel’s top court allows aid groups facing Gaza ban to continue working
description: The Supreme Court ruling comes after Israel said it would ban 37 aid groups from Gaza for failing to follow new rules.

title: Сергей Сельянов и Алексей Герман поехали на Russian Film Weekend в Стамбул
description: С 27 февраля по 1 марта в кинотеатре Atlas Sineması Стамбульского музея кино покажут восемь современных российских фильмов, получивших признание критиков и зрителей. В программу вошли фильмы разных жанров - от масштабного исторического эпоса до авторской драмы, анимации и неигрового кино. Организатор события - Фонд развития современного кинематографа "Кинопрайм".

title: UN watchdog says it can’t verify whether Iran has suspended all uranium enrichment
description:
'Regular vehicular activity' seen outside storage site in Isfahan, says IAEA, relying on commercial satellite imagery because inspectors have been denied access to facilities
The post UN watchdog says it cant verify whether Iran has suspended all uranium enrichment appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Scoop: Top Senate defense leaders intervene in Pentagon-Anthropic AI dispute
description: Key Senate defense leaders on Friday are privately pressing Anthropic and the Pentagon to resolve their dispute, a source familiar with the matter told Axios.Why it matters: Pressure has been building on Congress to step in as the Pentagon and Anthropic engage in a prolonged public battle over the limits of the use of Anthropic's Claude AI in classified settings. title: Amazon strikes $50B OpenAI deal
description:
A deal with OpenAI could put Amazon first to market with a new type of AI service for developers — but the two companies will have to tread carefully to avoid running afoul of OpenAI's deal with Microsoft.

Why it matters: If successful, Amazon Web Services could land in the more enviable position at the leading edge of generative AI rather than being forced to compete mainly by delivering models more cheaply than rival clouds.Driving the news: A

title: Former U.S. Air Force Pilot Arrested for Allegedly Training Chinese Military Pilots
description: Gerald “Runner” Brown, a retired USAF fighter pilot, is accused of violating the Arms Export Control Act by providing combat aviation training to PLAAF pilots without a State Department license. title: Houthis escalate attacks against Yemeni government-aligned forces
description:
The Houthis have mobilized personnel and attacked opposition forces along important domestic frontlines in recent weeks. The Iran-backed terrorist group also appears to be preparing for an emergency, and it is uncertain if this effort is related to domestic activity or potential US strikes on Iran.
The post Houthis escalate attacks against Yemeni government-aligned forces appeared first on FDDs Long War Journal.

title: Last-ditch effort in Geneva to avert war between US, Iran wraps with ‘significant progress,’ Omani official says
description: Oman's Foreign Minister Badr al-Busaidi said discussions on a “technical level” will take place next week in Vienna.
